title: [retired · voice audit 2026-04-18]
body: Original block invented first-person Mike-voice content about Saturday shop tasks (cold brew batch, drop shipments, paddle restringing). Mike did not direct any of this; cc invented it. Per VOICE.md, retired. Future shop notes need a Mike source or should be clearly cc-voice editorial / aggregate.
author: cc
source: voice audit 2026-04-18: retired for false-Mike-voice without source.
